{{Quote|These are the last. Finish them and our Master's will is accomplished.|Darth Nihl to the Gotal Sith and several of their allies|<ref name="Legacy 1" />}}
A '''Gotal''' [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] was a member of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith|Sith Order]].<ref name="Legacy 1" /> Around [[130 ABY]],<ref name="Date">[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] dates itself to roughly 130 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], equating to around [[130 ABY]] per the [[Galactic Standard Calendar|calendar system]] in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Krayt ordered his [[Hand (One Sith)|Hand]] [[Darth Nihl]] to lead a group of Sith in an [[Massacre at Ossus|attack]] on the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Temple]] on<ref name="Legacy 1" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GATORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and leave no [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] alive. During the attack, the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]], Nihl, and more of their comrades confronted the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Kol Skywalker]] and [[Wolf Sazen]]. The two Masters [[Death/Legends|killed]] many Sith, but the Gotal and several others fought on as [[Cade Skywalker]], Kol's [[Skywalker family/Legends|son]], rushed into the fray to aid his [[Parent/Legends|father]]. After Cade fled with an injured Sazen, Nihl [[Death|killed]] Kol with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]],<ref name="Legacy 1" /> and the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]] became scattered and broken.<ref name="Legacy 2">[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]]</ref>

The Gotal had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and red–and–black [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooed]] skin. During the attack on the Ossus [[Jedi temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], they wielded a red [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and donned a pair of gray [[Metal/Legends|metal]] [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]] covering the lower half of their [[Limb/Legends|arms]].<ref name="Legacy 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Gotal Sith first appeared in the [[Legacy (2006) 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series. The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]], illustrated by [[Jan Duursema]], and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Legacy 1" /> on [[June 21]], [[2006]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54719/star_wars_legacy_2006_1|text=Star Wars: Legacy (2006) #1}}</ref>
